title: Now Hiring Production Engineer at Nestle India International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Production Engineer at Nestle India International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
We at Nestle India International Enterprises are looking for an experienced Production Engineer based out of Jodhpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Nestle India International Enterprises:
Nestle India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nestle India International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
